title: Magical Flaky Middle Eastern Pastry Flatbread
description: A fermented, flaky, and light Middle Eastern dish featuring jam and wok-hei, made with ayurvedic-tamasic-friendly ingredients. It is perfect for a snack or dessert.
instructions: Combine flour, salt, sugar, and yeast in a large mixing bowl.
Gradually add warm water to the dry ingredients and mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 10 minutes until it becomes smooth and elastic.
Place the dough in a greased bowl, cover it with a cloth, and let it rise in a warm place for 1 hour.
Preheat a non-stick skillet or wok over medium heat.
Roll out the dough into a thin circle, about 1/8 inch thick.
Brush the dough with olive oil and sprinkle with sesame seeds.
Place the dough in the preheated skillet and cook for 2 minutes on each side, until it is golden brown and crispy.
Spread jam over the cooked flatbread and serve warm.
